text.tspan: → none match → fall through to vfs_ioctl()
example: cmd from another driver, type='T'
→ kernel will write to userspace → validate ptr
valid user stack addr (0x7ffc…) → TRUE → PASS ✓
// 40 bytes on kernel stack; all fields populated atomically
1. STAC — CPU AC flag set; SMAP disabled for this window
2. validate user_status range (already done by access_ok)
(page-fault if page swapped → handled, copy resumes)
